prompt: I want to set up a monthly automated audit of all my AI agents to make sure they maintain enterprise quality standards. How should I approach this, and can you run the audit now? My DB: postgresql://postgres:testpass@tramway.proxy.rlwy.net:54364/railway
assertions: The output explains a structured audit workflow with at least 4 clear steps
The output references the 10-dimension quality rubric with specific dimension names
The output mentions using the schedule skill or cron for automated monthly runs
The output provides complete Python scoring code (not just pseudo-code)
The output includes a final verification step to confirm improvements after changes
The output defines enterprise quality as 8+/10 or equivalent explicit threshold
The output recommends running the audit before production deploys as a quality gate
The output includes a dimension coverage table or per-dimension statistics
